description_long: This wardrobe features a modern, rectangular design with a light gray frame and darker wood-textured doors and drawers on the front. The front face is divided into two main vertical doors above and two horizontal drawers below, each equipped with sleek metallic bar handles. The sides and top are finished in a uniform light gray color with a subtle vertical grain pattern, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The handles are symmetrically placed, enhancing the wardrobe's balanced look. The overall construction suggests a sturdy build, likely suitable for storing clothing or other personal items. Its minimalist style makes it appropriate for urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or communal spaces.
description: A modern, rectangular wardrobe with light gray sides and darker wood-textured front doors and drawers, featuring metallic bar handles. Its clean, minimalist design is suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: The left side of the wardrobe, showing a plain light gray surface with a subtle vertical grain pattern.
description_view_1: The front view displays two vertical doors above and two horizontal drawers below, all with metallic bar handles and a darker wood texture.
description_view_2: The right side of the wardrobe, identical to the left, with a plain light gray surface and vertical grain.
description_view_3: The back of the wardrobe, featuring a plain light gray surface with a subtle vertical grain pattern.
